chunks.title: Call to Prophesy Against Gog
chunks.reason: Introduction of the oracle and description of Gog's assembled forces.

chunks.title: Gog's Plan and Merchant Reaction
chunks.reason: Shift to Gog's internal thoughts and the merchants' questioning of his motives.

chunks.title: Divine Judgment on Gog
chunks.reason: Yahweh's response detailing the timing, cosmic signs, and final judgment.
